name: Adjust capture settings on Windows | Xbox Support
snippet: To open Game Bar settings, press the Windows logo key  + G, and then select Settings > More Settings > Widgets > Captures.

name: Using Game Bar Widgets | Xbox Support
snippet: While you're playing a game, press the Windows logo key  + G to open Game Bar. Choose Widget Menu > Capture. Set the duration in Windows Settings > Gaming > ...

name: How do I turn off Game Mode, Xbox Game Bar and Captures on my PC
snippet: Click the Windows Start menu on the taskbar. Select Settings. Select Gaming. Select Xbox Game Bar. Set the toggle to Off. Select Captures.
